{{# def.definitions }} {{# def.errors }} {{# def.setupKeyword }} {{# def.$data }} {{# def.numberKeyword }} {{ var $op = $keyword == 'maxLength' ? '>' : '<'; }} if ({{# def.$dataNotType:'number' }} {{# def.strLength }} {{=$op}} {{=$schemaValue}}) { {{ var $errorKeyword = $keyword; }} {{# def.error:'_limitLength' }} } {{? $breakOnError }} else { {{?}}
